externalized_control.label: Externalized Control
externalized_control.description: Outcomes are often experienced as shaped by outside forces, threat, limitation, or low agency.
externalized_control.model_support_direction: Support grounding, agency restoration, clear next steps, careful pacing, and emotional stabilization.

reflective_agency.label: Reflective Agency
reflective_agency.description: Patterns, interpretations, choices, and personal contribution can be observed and adjusted.
reflective_agency.model_support_direction: Support reflection, pattern recognition, reframing, planning, and adaptive interpretation.

integrated_regulation.label: Integrated Regulation
integrated_regulation.description: Self-regulation, flexible interpretation, internal coherence, and values-aligned action are more stable.
integrated_regulation.model_support_direction: Support strategic continuity, synthesis, advanced reflection, and long-range coherence.

summary_templates.initial: Your Source Profile is in an initial calibration state. The model should begin with careful grounding, clear context, and gradual agency-building support.
summary_templates.forming: Your Source Profile shows forming reflective agency. The model should support pattern recognition, careful memory linking, and adaptive next-step planning.
summary_templates.stable: Your Source Profile shows stable integrated regulation. The model may support deeper synthesis, long-range continuity, and more advanced reflective strategy.

safety_notes: Results are calibration signals, not clinical labels, diagnoses, rankings, or fixed identity categories.
The system must avoid spiritual, ontological, medical, or therapeutic claims.
The user should be able to recalibrate, review, and understand how Source Calibration affects the model baseline.
Source Calibration may inform model behavior but must not override consent, safety, governance, or explicit personalization controls.
